Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class OmniUiCard

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.OmniUiCard
public class OmniUiCard extends Metadata

Java class for OmniUiCard complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OmniUiCard">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="authorName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="clonedFromOmniUiCardKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataSourceConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="omniUiCardType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OmniUiCardType"/>
         <element name="overrideKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="propertySetConfig" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sampleDataSourceResponse" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="stylingConfiguration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
